name: CoinGecko API
notes: Market data API — treated as T1 equivalent for price and volume signals. Parser mapping required before enabling.

name: NewsAPI Crypto
notes: Requires NEWS_API_KEY. Provides broad coverage aggregation. Enable via ENABLE_NEWSAPI=true.

name: Whale Alert (X)
notes: X account monitoring — disabled by default; enable after X API credentials are configured. Severity capped at 60 per crypto T4 rules. See docs/x-source-rules.md.

name: CZ Binance (X)
notes: X account monitoring — disabled by default; enable after X API credentials are configured. Severity capped at 60 per crypto T4 rules. See docs/x-source-rules.md.

name: Vitalik Buterin (X)
notes: X account monitoring — disabled by default; enable after X API credentials are configured. Severity capped at 60 per crypto T4 rules. See docs/x-source-rules.md.

name: X Search: BTC Breakout
notes: X keyword search — disabled by default; enable after X API credentials are configured. Severity capped at 60 per crypto T4 rules. See docs/x-source-rules.md.
search_query: (#Bitcoin OR #BTC) (breakout OR ATH OR crash) -is:retweet lang:en

name: X Search: ETH DeFi
notes: X keyword search — disabled by default; enable after X API credentials are configured. Severity capped at 60 per crypto T4 rules. See docs/x-source-rules.md.
search_query: (#Ethereum OR #ETH OR #DeFi) (exploit OR hack OR launch OR upgrade) -is:retweet lang:en
